name: Team and Experience
description: Our team composition and relevant experience

content.title: Team and Experience
content.content:
# Team and Experience

## Our Team for This Engagement

### Project Lead

**Role**: Overall Project Lead and Technical Architect

The project lead brings **deep technical expertise in MeshWeaver, Agentic AI, and Azure architecture**. As a key architect of the MeshWeaver platform, they will:

- Lead overall project delivery and technical direction
- Guide the agentic AI architecture and implementation
- Ensure platform capabilities are optimally leveraged
- Oversee data model design and AI integration
- Serve as primary technical contact for the client

### Team Composition

| Role | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|
| **Project Lead** | Technical direction, architecture, delivery |
| **Domain Expert** | Reinsurance data modeling, business process validation |
| **AI/ML Engineer** | Model configuration, prompt engineering, accuracy tuning |
| **Integration Developer** | Azure integration, data connectivity |

## Relevant Experience

### Reinsurance Domain

| Area | Experience |
|------|------------|
| **Submissions processing** | Data extraction from broker submissions |
| **Claims management** | Workflow automation and document handling |
| **Contract management** | Terms extraction and analysis |
| **Reporting** | Regulatory and management reporting |

### AI/Document Intelligence

| Capability | Track Record |
|------------|-------------|
| **Document extraction** | Multiple projects with >85% accuracy |
| **Classification systems** | Multi-class document categorization |
| **Natural language search** | Semantic search over large document repositories |
| **Email processing** | Triage and prioritization systems |

### Azure Platform

| Component | Experience Level |
|-----------|------------------|
| Azure OpenAI | Production deployments |
| Cosmos DB | Large-scale document stores |
| Container Apps / AKS | Multiple production environments |
| Azure Document Intelligence | OCR and form extraction |
| Azure Service Bus | Event-driven architectures |

## MeshWeaver Platform Maturity

MeshWeaver has been developed and refined through multiple client engagements with proven capabilities:

- **Data Connectivity**: Multiple source types
- **AI Integration**: Multi-model support
- **Workflow Engine**: Business processes
- **UI Framework**: Layouts and dashboards

## Similar Engagements

### Document Processing in Insurance
- 87% extraction accuracy on first deployment
- Improved to 94% through iterative refinement
- Processing time reduced from hours to minutes

### Email Triage System
- 92% accuracy in urgency classification
- 85% reduction in manual triage time
- Integrated with existing workflow systems

## Summary

| Dimension | Our Position |
|-----------|-------------|
| **Leadership** | MeshWeaver architects and agentic AI experts |
| **Technical capability** | Proven Azure and AI delivery |
| **Platform maturity** | MeshWeaver deployed in production |
| **Relevant experience** | Insurance/reinsurance document processing |
| **Capacity** | Dedicated team for PoC duration |
